sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The board looks the same. Let me check what changed. The green square at the bottom now has a white border around it! This suggests that clicking on a bottom square selects it (adds a white border). Let me try clicking on another square to see if it deselecting happens or if multiple can be selected.
Wait, looking more carefully, the first bottom square (green) bottom square now has a white border.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current segmentation to see what changed
# Check current segmentation to see what changed
prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation
curr_seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Compare
for i, prev_node in prev_seg['nodes']:
    curr_node = curr_seg['nodes'][i]
    if prev_node['color'] != curr_node['color'] or prev_node['pixels'] != curr_node['pixels']:
        print("Node", i, "changed: color from", prev_node['color'], "to", curr_node['color'], "pixels from", prev_node['pixels'], "to", curr_node['pixels'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
